player_question.p: Opa, you got a minute, brother?
Hey, you look alive... más o menos.
Oi, don't shoot! I'm just a contractor, caramba.
Hola mate, seen any patrols nearby?
Opa amigo, you have any spare credits?
Tudo bem? Or is the rot getting to you?
Psst, freelancer! Over here, rápido!
You work for Exxoil too, or are you free agent?
Ey, take it easy with that weapon, cara.
Looking for work? Or just looking to die?
Opa, is it safe to talk in the open like this?
Hey man, you smell like kerosene and fear.
Diga me, is the path to the jungle clear?
Hola, did Rosskrild and Silva send you to find me?
Brother, you look like you’ve seen a ghost.
Oi, stop! I’m not one of them... yet.
What’s the word? Is the base still holding?
Hey, you got any clean water? Pago bien.
Com licença, are you the fix-it guy they mentioned?
Ey, stay back! Keep your distance, brother.

npc_awnser.n: Calma, kid. I'm just trying to reach tomorrow.
Oi... you sound like you still think money matters.
Hola. Keep your voice down, the jungle is listening.
I don't care who signed your check, just stay away.
Tudo ruim, friend. Everything is rot and shadows now.
Mierda, another contractor. The island is full of ghosts.
I'm busy mourning the world, cara. What do you want?
If you're looking for Gethulius, they’re all dead or hungry.
Look at you... fresh off the boat and ready to die.
Speak fast. Time is the only thing we don't have.
Opa, another soul for the grinder. Welcome to hell.
You want info? It's gonna cost you more than credits.
The only 'tudo bem' here is being six feet under.
Hola contractor. Try not to bleed on my boots.
I work for me now. The corporations are gone, buddy.
Don't touch me. The plague doesn't care about your job title.
Porra, I thought I was the last one in this sector.
You have the look of someone who wants to live. Bad luck.
Yeah, I'm here. But my help is expensive, entendeu?
Whatever you're selling, I'm not buying. Vaza!

player_question.p: The Exxoil rig is dark... what happened?
Why did they bring those 'survivors' here, porra?
I heard the vaccines were fake. Is it true?
We need to find the Gethulius vault, now!
Escucha, the infection is spreading to the coast.
Is there any fuel left in the archipelago?
They said this was a paradise. Some joke, huh?
Where are the bosses? Rosskrild vanished!
The military facility fell in hours... how?
We can't stay here, the rotters are coming.
Is it true the 'asymptomatic' guy is still out there?
People are killing each other for a bit of scrap.
Can we trust the Silva family? I heard rumors.
The jungle is moving, man. It’s not normal.
They promised us safety and gave us a tomb.
How much time do we have before the grid dies?
I saw the labs. It wasn't just a plague, was it?
The shadows... they move even when there’s no light.
Everyone is greedy, even with the world ending.
Mierda, we are just rats in a corporate cage.

npc_awnser.n: Greed is a bitch, cara. They wanted more workers, they got monsters.
The grid is flickering because the workers are being eaten.
There are no vaccines, mate. Just stuff to keep you numb.
Rosskrild and Silva are probably halfway to the moon by now.
The 'survivors' were just a delivery system for the rot.
Safe? Nothing is safe when the air smells like rot.
Exxoil didn't care about us, only the barrels, mano.
I saw the military run. When they run, you should hide.
The jungle grows fast when it’s fed with human blood.
Money is just paper to burn for warmth now, amigo.
The asymptomatic one... he’s the king of this mess now.
The labs were making something else. Something worse.
Don't talk to me about trusts. Trust gets you killed.
The archipelago is a battery that’s finally run dry.
They called it 'Bit Rot' because it eats you from inside.
I heard the bosses locked themselves in the underwater bunker.
No fuel, no hope, just the tropical heat and the dead.
Every time a generator dies, a part of us dies too.
The alliance broke the moment the first scream started.
Stay low. If the rotters don't get you, the hunger will.

player_question.p: Is the radio still dead? No rescue?
I can't take the screaming anymore, caramba.
They say the continent is just a big graveyard.
If I die, don't let me turn into one of those.
The helicopter pad is empty. We are stuck.
I heard Brazil fell in three weeks. Is that true?
What if the rescue boat is just another trap?
I'm lucky to be alive, but for how long, mate?
The rotters... they almost got my arm back there.
I want to go home, but there’s no home left.
Those bastards at Gethulius deserve to rot too.
Did you hear the signal? It sounded like a scream.
I'm tired of running, brother. So tired.
If we reach the signal tower, maybe someone hears us.
They said the USA went dark first. No one is coming.
Is there any land left that isn't infected, mano?
I have a family back in the mainland... are they...?
We are just ghosts waiting for our bodies to catch up.
One last push to the docks. That’s all I got left.
The world is dead, and we are just the maggots.

npc_awnser.n: The radio only plays static and the sounds of the dying.
Rescue? Amigo, we are the ones the world forgot.
Brazil is a jungle of rotters now. There is no going back.
If you turn, I’ll be the one to put a bullet in your head.
The bosses took the last ships. We are the leftovers.
USA, Europe, Asia... it’s all dark. We are the last light.
Better to die here than to see what’s left of the cities.
Luck is just a fancy word for 'not my turn yet', cara.
I saw the satellite images. The world is black, brother.
The signal tower is a beacon for the monsters, nothing more.
We are contractors of the apocalypse now. No pay, just pain.
The mainland is gone. The sea is our only wall now.
Don't look back. There's nothing but fire behind us.
If there was a God, He left this island a long time ago.
Maybe the rot is the next step for us. A quiet end.
Don't talk about family. It makes the dying harder.
The corporations won. They owned our lives, now they own our deaths.
I heard a broadcast from a ship... it sounded like they were eating the captain.
There is no 'home', kid. This tropical hell is all we got.
Shut up and keep your gun ready. The sun is going down.

player_question.p: Ouvir na rádio that a group is starving in the jungle.
Heard a signal... someone needs help near the rigs, cara.
The survivors are desperate, mate. Any leads?
People are talking about a stash... is it real, amigo?
Diga me, who's the one looking for extra hands?
I heard a whisper on the comms about a supply run.
Is there anyone left in this island worth saving, brother?
I found a note from a contractor. Something about a missing {item}.
Opa, is it true the Gethulius guys left some gear behind?
The radio is static, but I caught a name. You know them?
Everyone is dying for a bit of scrap. What's the job?
Hola, are you the one looking for a fix-it guy?
They say the military left a {item} near the docks.
I want to help, but only if the price is right, entendeu?
The jungle is screaming today. Any work to keep me busy?
Escucha, I heard a group is bunkered down in the lab.
Is there a bounty for finding lost corporate property?
They said you have the coordinates for the supply drop.
Pelo amor de Deus, someone has to do something about this.
The archipelago is quiet... too quiet. Where are the survivors?

npc_awnser.n: Dios says we should share, but first, find me a {item}.
If you find a {item}, maybe I’ll tell you who’s still breathing.
Survival isn't free, cara. Go get me a {item} first.
The group is dead if they don't get a {item} soon, brother.
I don't trust the radio, but I trust a man with a {item}.
The Rosskrild vault is locked. We need a {item} to bypass it.
Mierda, everyone wants something. Find a {item} and we talk.
Charity died with the mainland. Get a {item} or vaza!
God helps those who find a {item} for the group, amigo.
It’s a tropical hell out there. You'll need a {item} to survive.
The contract is simple: bring me a {item} and don't get bit.
I have the intel, but it’s gonna cost you one {item}.
Don't look at me like that. This island eats the weak without a {item}.
Exxoil left a lot of junk, but we specifically need a {item}.
You want to be a hero? Fine. Start by finding a {item}.
Tudo bem, freelancer. Find that {item} and I'll pay you in hope.
There’s a group in the shadows waiting for a {item} to move.
Pray all you want, but a {item} will save you faster than Jesus.
The alliance is watching. Show them you’re useful, find a {item}.
Greed is the only thing left. Bring a {item} and I'll share the loot.

player_question.p: Psst... look what I found. Ready to trade, brother?
I got the {item}. Now where’s my cut, caramba?
Ouvir, I have the goods. Is the coast clear?
Aqui está, one {item} as requested. Don't spend it all at once.
The rotters almost got me for this {item}, amigo.
I have the {item}. Tell me it was worth the blood.
Check it out, the {item} is clean. Pay up, cara.
Is this what you wanted? This {item} cost me a lot of sweat.
Hola, I’m back from the jungle with your {item}.
Business is booming, right? I got your {item} right here.
Take this {item} and tell the group I’m not a rotter.
The deal is done. I have the {item}, you have the rewards.
Mierda, it was hard to find, but I have the {item}.
One {item}, fresh from the ruins. What do I get?
I don't have all day, brother. Here is the {item}.
You see this? This {item} is the ticket out of here.
I risked my neck for this {item}. It better be worth it.
The shadow partners will be happy. I have the {item}.
Opa, mission accomplished. The {item} is yours.
Let’s make this fast. Here is the {item}. Give me the goods.

npc_awnser.n: The gambler always takes all... but you can have this {reward_item}.
Everything has a price for the bidder. Take this {reward_item}.
Opa! This {item} is perfect. Here’s a {reward_item} for your trouble.
You’re a good fix-it guy, cara. Take this {reward_item} and sume.
Mierda, you actually survived. Here, take this {reward_item}.
The corporate web is tangled, but this {reward_item} is yours.
Fair trade, amigo. A {reward_item} for a piece of the past.
Don't tell anyone where you got this {reward_item}, entendeu?
God provides... through people like you. Take the {reward_item}.
Business is booming indeed. Here is your {reward_item}, brother.
The jungle didn't eat you? Impressive. Take this {reward_item}.
I hope this {reward_item} keeps you alive another hour, mate.
The Silva family sends their regards. Here’s a {reward_item}.
Take the {reward_item} and keep your mouth shut, okay?
One man's trash is another man's {reward_item}. Vaza now.
You’ve earned this {reward_item}. Try not to die on the way back.
Greed is good, but staying alive is better. Have a {reward_item}.
Nice work, contractor. This {reward_item} should help you out.
The islands are hell, but at least you have this {reward_item} now.
Porra, finally! Take this {reward_item} and leave me alone.

options.npc_answer: I just escaped with: [inventory_list]. You look like you've seen better days too.

options.player_question: You look like you've been through hell.
options.npc_answer: Hell? No, this is just corporate cost-cutting with extra steps. At least in hell, the medical benefits would be better.

options.player_question: How do I stay alive out here?
options.npc_answer: Here's a map. This may save you.

options.player_question: Any way to get around faster?
options.npc_answer: Exxoil left keys in all their jeeps. Same ignition. Corporate cost-cutting. Try these—they might work.

options.player_question: The tool here looks like garbage!
options.npc_answer: The main engineer of the Island build everything upon Blueprints, you can scavange for them. I have some, take it son...

options.player_question: I've heard a helicopter landed with survivors, is this true?
options.npc_answer: Sim... sí...yes? They brought the disgrace to us, some asymphomatic from the continent, it becomes a hell after them! cof...cof...
Brazil fell first. Then the rest. The Plague didn't care about borders. Only the islands survived. For now.

options.player_question: Why did the helicopters leave us?
options.npc_answer: Standard protocol. Next Petrol doesn't rescue liabilities. We are the liability now. Every person is a potential carrier.

options.player_question: I have my ID, how to get faster to the helipoint?
options.npc_answer: Helipoint? That area is a mess kiddo! Best you can do is survive here.

options.player_question: Hey. You look like someone who knows a way off this rock. I'm... between contractors.
options.npc_answer: WHa! Look at you – rags and desperation. Perfect. Listen, criança. I need a mule. There's a suitcase – old leather, brass locks, smells like trouble. Find it, then hand it to anyone who knows the code 'the tide is rising.' They'll pay. I just want my ticket out before the rot finds me. Everything has a toll. You in?
options.rqst_item: [Suitcase, Bag, Large Backpack, Small Backpack, Large Satchel, Medium Satchel, Small Satchel]

options.player_question: I think I have something that may interest you...
options.npc_answer: Have you found the suitcase? Is there a laptop inside of it? This is research and it's valuable!

options.player_question: I've scavanging after the island falls.
options.npc_answer: Everybody are. Have you found anything important?

options.player_question: Do you know anything about the files?
options.npc_answer: I'm trying to get alive here, but people are talking about pharmas trying to stole some shit.

options.player_question: If I have a mobile I could try to call someone...
options.npc_answer: Lucky for you, take my Mobile. It's useless right now.
options.tip: Your ID may save your life

options.player_question: Yes, but looks useless right now. Do you have something to trade?
options.npc_answer: Well, well. The scarecrow delivers. Here's your payment. Don't spend it all in one grave. Some days you win, some days you lose. Today you're just... disposable. Hehehe. Now get lost before I decide you're worth more as bait.
options.tip: Scavange around to find the lost Suitcase.

options.player_question: The laptop is here, do you have something to trade?
options.npc_answer: Reasearch has it's price, take this and try to get out of here as fast as you can! Rotters and Rogues around, can't trust anyone anymore.
options.tip: This laptop contains simulation data of the virus.

options.npc_answer: This is what people were saying about the black market pharmas around here. I dont have much, get this Blueprints
options.tip: The raw data gnome of the flu.

options.player_question: I don't know if you are the right person but here is it.
options.npc_answer: The vaccine simulations! We need to get out of here fast.
options.tip: Some presentations and leaked data due bad cleaning and public usage.
